contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Partner Check-in: type-to-filter combobox on both dropdowns
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/249
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/250
  
  Details:
  Two follow-up DApp PRs after Gary asked for the inventory-movement style typeahead pattern on the Partner Check-in form. Operator UX upgrade — replaces both <select> elements with text-input + autocomplete-dropdown combobox without changing any downstream value-bound code paths.
  
  ## Shipped
  
  - dapp PR #249 — Contributor Name typeahead. Visible <input id='contributorSearch'> + filterable <div id='contributorAutocomplete'> drives the operator-facing UI; hidden <select id='contributorName'> stays in the DOM so the existing signature-verification, onContributorSelected dispatch, and submit-payload code paths work unchanged.
  - dapp PR #250 — Partner Name typeahead, same pattern. Re-bound on every onContributorSelected() call because the eligible partner list changes per contributor. Three states handled cleanly: zero partners mapped (input disabled with placeholder), exactly one mapped (auto-fills + auto-selects to preserve prior UX), 2+ mapped (full typeahead).
  
  ## Implementation pattern (now used twice, available to copy a third time)
  
  - Visible <input type='text'> + absolute-positioned <div> for the autocomplete list.
  - Hidden <select> preserved so all downstream API points remain unchanged.
  - mousedown handler (not click) on each list row so selection fires before blur hides the dropdown.
  - focus event renders all items (clicking the field shows the full list).
  - Escape dismisses; blur hides with 180ms delay so click on a row registers first.
  - Idempotent re-binding via node-clone for the Partner field (list refreshes per-contributor).
  
  ## Operator UX win
  With Operator + Freight Provider partner_types now included (PRs #247 + #248), a contributor with multiple cross-role partners (e.g. an operator who also runs a wholesale account) gets a fast filter instead of a long scroll. Same applies to the global ~15-30 contributor list.
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/249
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/250
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
